正在提交 RJob 任务: liyizhuo-dev-20260114-172624
配置: GPU=12, CPU=128, MEMORY=1000000MB
01-14 17:26:38 [ERROR] Please provide task command.
usage: For single task: rjob submit [options] -- <command line>
For multi-task: rjob submit [common options] -- <common command line> --- [task options] -- <task command line> ...
options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
job:
  --name JOB_NAME       Job name, default will generate a unique one as <user-name>-<timestamp>
  --folder JOB_FOLDER   The directory which will be packaged and uploaded
  --group GROUP         User quota group
  --delete              Delete the job if exists and resubmit
  --elastic ELASTIC     Feature which indicates the job can be dynamically scaled
  --elastic-module MODULE
                        elastic module.
  --namespace NAMESPACE
                        Used to specify rjob namespace
  --auto-delete-duration AUTO_DELETE_DURATION
                        The duration time for rjob to cleanup. Default value is 30d.
  --enable-sshd         whether enable SSH, make sure the image contains sshd
  --share               whether enable group share
  --dry-run DRY_RUN     dry run mode for developer debugging
  --predict-only PREDICT_ONLY
                        predict rjob to judge whether there is enough resources for this rjob to run
  --i-know-i-am-wasting-resource I_KNOW_I_AM_WASTING_RESOURCE
                        skip clean policy management if set to true
  --task-type {normal,idle}
                        Task type: 'normal' (default) or 'idle'. Idle tasks receive the label 'rjob.brainpp.cn/zs-task-type=rjob-idle' (normal
                        tasks get 'rjob-normal'), have restartPolicy restricted to 'Never' or 'RestartJobOnFailure', can be configured with
                        terminationGracePeriodSeconds (default 0, max 300 seconds), and have backoffLimit (default 1, max 100). Idle tasks do NOT
                        support --enable-self-health.
  --priority PRIORITY   when task_type is normal,default is 5,the value could be range in 1-9,when task_type is idle,should not use this parameter
  --enable-lxcfs ENABLE_LXCFS
                        whether enable lxcfs
task:
  --task_name TASK_NAME
                        Task name
  --metadata-name METADATA_NAME
                        Metadata name
  --charged-group CHARGED_GROUP
                        User charged quota group
  -P REPLICAS, --replica REPLICAS, --replicas REPLICAS
                        Replica count of the task
  -r RESTART_POLICY, --restart-policy RESTART_POLICY
                        Task restart policy
  --termination-grace-period-seconds TERMINATION_GRACE_PERIOD_SECONDS
                        Set pod terminationGracePeriodSeconds which is the duration in seconds the pod needs to terminate gracefully. Default is
                        0, max 30s for idle tasks. If set to 0, the pod will be forcefully terminated immediately.
  --backoff_limit BACKOFF_LIMIT
                        Task retry backoff limit. Default is 2 for normal tasks, 1 for idle tasks (max 100 for idle tasks).
  --preemptible {yes,no,best-effort}
                        Task preemptible
  --private-machine PRIVATE_MACHINE
                        Private machine or not
  --share-host-shm SHARE_HOST_SHM
                        Mount host /dev/shm to container, must set to True if using checkpoint engine
  --store-host-nvme STORE_HOST_NVME
                        Mount host /dev/nvme1n1 to container, must set to True if save date on host
  --enable-self-health ENABLE_SELF_HEALTH
                        开启 rjob 自愈功能，当机器故障、任务hang住会自动重新拉起rjob。注意：闲时任务不支持该功能。
  --self-health-count SELF_HEALTH_COUNT
                        rjob 自愈次数上限
  --grace-period-minutes GRACE_PERIOD_MINUTES
                        自愈介入等待时间,单位分钟
  --termination-grace-period-minutes TERMINATION_GRACE_PERIOD_MINUTES
                        自愈任务数据回收时间，单位分钟
  --notify-webhook NOTIFY_WEBHOOK
                        自愈任务消息通知webhook url
  --enable-auto-replace-node ENABLE_AUTO_REPLACE_NODE
                        自愈功能自动换机，关闭后只打污点。
  --image IMAGE         Container image
  --image-pull-policy {ImagePullPolicy.IfNotPresent,ImagePullPolicy.Always,ImagePullPolicy.Never}
                        Image pull policy
  --cpu CPU             Number of CPU cores
  --gpu GPU             Number of GPU cores
  --memory MEMORY_IN_MB
                        Number of limited memory in MiB. If task used memory over it, it will be killed due to OOM
  --custom-resources CUSTOM_RESOURCES [CUSTOM_RESOURCES ...]
                        Customized resources. For example: --custom-resources rdma/mlnx_shared=8
  -e ENV [ENV ...], --env ENV [ENV ...], --set-env ENV [ENV ...]
                        Environment variables. For example: --set-env TEST=1
  --positive-tags POSITIVE_TAGS [POSITIVE_TAGS ...]
                        Features which the worker machine MUST have.
  --negative-tags NEGATIVE_TAGS [NEGATIVE_TAGS ...]
                        Features which the worker machine MUST NOT have.
  --gang-start GANG_START
                        Feature which inject all replica IP in Pod ENV.
  --host-network HOST_NETWORK
                        Feature which enable pod use host network.
  --regulate-name REGULATE_NAME
                        Feature which regulates pod worker name suffix.
  --use-file-store USE_FILE_STORE
                        Use file_store for torch distributed initialization. It mounts from remote nfs server, which is the only NAS that init pg
                        successfully.
  --file-store-nfs-path FILE_STORE_NFS_PATH
                        NFS server and mount path when using file path, format is NFS_SERVER:NFS_PATH:MOUNT_PATH
  --auto-restart AUTO_RESTART
                        Feature which indicates whether the job can be automatically restarted when the job is failed. Value: 'false'-default,
                        'true'-常规多机长跑任务, 'always'-数据无限比如预训练任务, 详情参考:
                        https://wvixbzgc0u7.feishu.cn/wiki/LkJFwQMaxiBI5zkobS9craHin4f?from=from_copylink
  --mount MOUNT_CONFIG [MOUNT_CONFIG ...]
                        Mount config for each task replica. Format is: juicefs+s3://{{bucket}}:{{mount_path}}, for example
                        juicefs+s3://oss.i.shaipower.com/bucket2:/mnt/juice2
  --privileged PRIVILEGED
                        dangerous privileged container, only for single machine test
  --sku SKU             A set of resources offered by the platform, will override other resource settings.
  --task-affinities TASK_AFFINITIES [TASK_AFFINITIES ...]
                        Pod affinity requirement among tasks, in the form of (soft|hard)/task_name
  --task-anti-affinities TASK_ANTI_AFFINITIES [TASK_ANTI_AFFINITIES ...]
                        Pod anti affinity requirement among tasks, in the form of (soft|hard)/task_name
  --gpu-affinity-type {AffinityQoS.QosTypeGuaranteed,AffinityQoS.QosTypeBesteffort}
                        GPU affinity type, either guaranteed or best effort
  --critical CRITICAL   Whether this task is critical
  --health-check HEALTH_CHECK [HEALTH_CHECK ...]
                        Pre-training health status check configuration. Specify one or more check types separated by commas. Example: --health-
                        check=all_group_reduce,4group_reduce
/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/rjob.sh: line 43: --: command not found
任务已提交！
查看任务状态: rjob list liyizhuo-dev-20260114-172624
查看任务日志: rjob logs job liyizhuo-dev-20260114-172624
删除任务: rjob delete liyizhuo-dev-20260114-172624
(verl2)  ⚡  🐍 verl2  root@test-lyz  /mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo 
这个报错啥意思

这个错误是因为 `rjob submit` 命令格式不正确。根据错误信息：

```
[ERROR] Please provide task command.
usage: For single task: rjob submit [options] -- <command line>
```

问题出在脚本的第43行：
```bash
/mnt/shared-storage-user/p1-shared/liyizhuo/scripts/rjob.sh: line 43: --: command not found
```

**原因分析：**

`rjob submit` 命令需要在所有选项参数后面，用 `--` 分隔符来指定实际要执行的命令。但你的脚本在第43行只有 `--`，后面没有跟具体的命令。

**正确的格式应该是：**
```bash
rjob submit [各种选项参数] -- <实际要执行的命令>
```

例如：
```bash
rjob submit --gpu 12 --cpu 128 --memory 1000000 -- bash -c "echo hello"
```

**解决方法：**

检查你的 `rjob.sh` 脚本第43行附近，应该是缺少了实际要执行的命令。你需要在 `--` 后面添加具体的命令，比如：

```bash
-- bash -c "你的实际命令"
```

或者

```bash
-- python your_script.py
```

能否分享一下你的 `rjob.sh` 脚本内容，特别是第43行附近的代码？这样我可以帮你更准确地定位问题。
